zh.Horton, Ivinghoe, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾霍頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當George Bulstrode於1485年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可時，他的父親Edward Bulstrode27歲，母親Mary Empson15歲。他於1514年與Joan Pigott在英國巴金哈姆爾霍頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.Horton, Ivinghoe, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾霍頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Bulstrode于1485年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可时，他的父亲Edward Bulstrode27岁，母亲Mary Empson15岁。他于1514年与Joan Pigott在英国巴金哈姆爾霍頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When George Bulstrode was born in 1485, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Bulstrode, was 27 and his mother, Mary Empson, was 15. He married Joan Pigott in 1514, in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1558, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Bulstrode est né en 1485, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Bulstrode, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Empson, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Joan Pigott en 1514, à Horton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1558, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Bulstrode 1485 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Bulstrode 27 und seine Mutter Mary Empson 15. Er hat 1514 in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England Joan Pigott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1558 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Bulstrode è nato il nel 1485 nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Bulstrode, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Empson, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Joan Pigott nel 1514, nel Horton, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1558, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Bulstrodeが1485年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父Edward Bulstrodeは27歳，母Mary Empsonは15歳であった。1514年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアホールトンでJoan Pigottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Bulstrode(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Bulstrode(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Empson(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1514년 영국 벅잉함실르 호르턴에서 Joan Pigott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Bulstrode nasceu em 1485, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Bulstrode, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Empson, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Pigott em 1514, em Horton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1558, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Bulstrode родился в 1485 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Bulstrode было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Empson, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Pigott в 1514 г. в местности хауртон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1558 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Bulstrode nació en 1485, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Bulstrode, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Empson, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joan Pigott en 1514, en Horton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1558, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
